description: Historical leaderboard snapshots. Each file is a complete leaderboard.json from that point in time.

snapshots.label: Initial leaderboard
snapshots.note: Arcee Trinity, Hunter Alpha, Healer Alpha — first 3 API models scored

snapshots.label: Added bias classification
snapshots.note: Added Claude Opus (subagent + manual), introduced bias labels (calibrated/sleepy/jittery/noisy)

snapshots.label: Added Sonnet 4.6 and Haiku 4.5
snapshots.note: Sonnet 4.6 subagent (jittery, F2 0.89), Haiku 4.5 subagent (broken, F2 0.08)

snapshots.label: Haiku rescored with non-compliant penalty
snapshots.note: Haiku 4.5 non-compliant outputs scored as all-missed instead of skipped

snapshots.label: Added 4 new models (batch evaluation)
snapshots.note: Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen3 235B, Grok 4.1 Fast, DeepSeek v3.2. Renamed metrics: hard_gate_recall, hard_gate_precision, fingerprint_match.
